name: unicode_a7dc_union_arm_count
description: Union arm-count changed by the fold: A{a:literal ƛ, aa, aaa} | B{b, bb} over {a:Ƛ,aa,aaa,b,bb}. The U+A7DC→U+019B fold lets arm A's literal match (two extra keys b/bb, score 2) and win over arm B (three extra keys, score 3); without the fold arm A would fail its literal and the union would resolve differently. Native now CLAIMS arm A. #555 Slice 2 — native now CLAIMS this non-ASCII match_string case (match_string folds through internal/debaml/bamlunicode, byte-for-byte Rust 1.93.0 str::to_lowercase / unicode-normalization 0.1.24, so the verdict is native's to claim, never case-fold-uncertain). want is BAML v0.223's byte-exact final parse, held by this differential; native==BAML is independently proven by the exhaustive bamlunicode Rust reference.
